# FunnelPlus

## Tags
filter, hopper, add, create, new

## Categories
layout

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/funnel-plus)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FunnelPlus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FunnelPlus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
